allow: Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); from collections import Counter; print\('total',len\(d\),'niveles',Counter\(x['nivel'] for x in d\)\); [print\(' ',x['nivel'],x['idorden'],'bono',x['idbono'],x.get\('situacion'\),'|',x.get\('operacion'\),'|',\(x.get\('articulo'\) or ''\)[:20]\) for x in d[:8]]")

Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); from collections import Counter; print\('total',len\(d\),'tipos',Counter\(x['tipo'] for x in d\),'situ',Counter\(x['situacion'] for x in d\)\); [print\(' ',x['idorden'],'b'+str\(x['idbono']\),x['situacion'],x['estado'],'|',x['operacion']\) for x in d[:6]]")

PowerShell(Start-Process -FilePath ".\\.venv\\Scripts\\uvicorn.exe" -ArgumentList "app.main:app","--host","0.0.0.0","--port","8077","--reload" -WorkingDirectory "C:\\Users\\santiago.arce\\Desktop\\Proyectos\\Planificador_Produccion" -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep 3; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8077/historico-produccion" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; "HTTP $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { "Error: $_" })

PowerShell(Invoke-RestMethod "http://localhost:8077/api/items?vista=empleado&desde=2026-06-16T00:00:00&hasta=2026-06-23T00:00:00" | Where-Object { $_.idorden -eq "5591" } | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "$\($_.id\) | tipo=$\($_.tipo\) | en_curso=$\($_.en_curso\) | start=$\($_.start\) | end=$\($_.end\)" })
